agent_trace.input_summary: Case facts, evidence matches, missing evidence, and prior specialist context.
agent_trace.output_summary: Privacy proof incomplete: signed DPA, retention and deletion evidence, cross-border transfer mechanism, subprocessor register.

requiredActions: Require signed DPA covering processing scope, subprocessors, retention, deletion, and transfers.
Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.
Require cross-border transfer mechanism and hosting/support region confirmation.
Require current subprocessor register and change-notification terms.

agent_trace.input_summary: Case facts, evidence matches, missing evidence, and prior specialist context.
agent_trace.output_summary: Security or continuity proof incomplete: final classification, license analysis, end-use certificate, import permit.

requiredActions: Require final export-control classification with manufacturer/counsel evidence before shipment.
Require documented license analysis and hold points for export, re-export, and import approvals.
Require final end-use and end-user certificate before hardware release or firmware support.
Require destination import permit or documented no-permit analysis before delivery.
Require approved delivery-site, chain-of-custody, and restricted-party screening evidence.
Require remote support runbook covering named personnel, MFA, logging, approval windows, and firmware controls.
Require BCP/DR and exit assistance evidence for critical workflows.

agent_trace.input_summary: Case facts, evidence matches, missing evidence, and prior specialist context.
agent_trace.output_summary: AI/analytics signal remains inside human oversight boundary.

requiredActions: Confirm human oversight and no automated approval for AI-assisted workflow outputs.

agent_trace.input_summary: Case facts, missing evidence, and specialist challenges.
agent_trace.output_summary: Matched precedent pattern: general incomplete evidence -> human review controls; similar learning cases=5, top pattern=Healthcare analytics vendor missing model-training exclusion.

controlSuggestions: Require signed model-training exclusion for patient or customer data before production.
Confirm DPA amendment covers analytics support, subprocessors, retention, deletion, and cross-border review.
Add reviewer question: Has any analytics data been used for model improvement or service training?
Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.
Require cross-border transfer mechanism and support-region confirmation.
Add reviewer question: Are any support teams accessing records outside approved regions?
Reject or escalate when customer-data model training is permitted and no signed opt-out exists.
Require signed model-training exclusion and human oversight plan before reconsideration.
learningContext.note: Learning memory is advisory. Deterministic policy and current evidence remain authoritative.

addedControls: Require signed model-training exclusion for patient or customer data before production.
Confirm DPA amendment covers analytics support, subprocessors, retention, deletion, and cross-border review.
Add reviewer question: Has any analytics data been used for model improvement or service training?

addedControls: Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.
Require cross-border transfer mechanism and support-region confirmation.
Add reviewer question: Are any support teams accessing records outside approved regions?
similarCases.title: Cross-border SaaS missing retention schedule

addedControls: Reject or escalate when customer-data model training is permitted and no signed opt-out exists.
Require signed model-training exclusion and human oversight plan before reconsideration.
Add reviewer question: Does the vendor use prompts, tickets, or submitted records for model improvement?
similarCases.title: AI vendor permitted customer-data training

addedControls: Require current subprocessor register before approval.
Require 30-day subprocessor change notification and right to object.
Add reviewer question: Are support and hosting locations consistent with transfer assessment?
similarCases.title: SaaS vendor missing subprocessor list

addedControls: Keep annual SOC 2 and ISO evidence refresh on reviewer calendar.
Monitor subprocessor changes and retention exceptions quarterly.
Confirm accountable human owner before operational approval.
similarCases.title: Complete vendor package approved with monitoring

learningContext.topPattern: Healthcare analytics vendor missing model-training exclusion

precedent.pattern: general incomplete evidence -> human review controls

agent_trace.input_summary: Specialist challenges, precedent pattern, and Compass advisory status.
agent_trace.output_summary: Required controls revised to 14 action(s); final risk=critical.

required_actions: Assign the accountable business unit or requester before approval.
Confirm the operating geography and regulatory perimeter.
Ask the domain owner whether esg, hse and bcm obligations apply.
Require final export-control classification with manufacturer/counsel evidence before shipment.
Require documented license analysis and hold points for export, re-export, and import approvals.
Require final end-use and end-user certificate before hardware release or firmware support.
Require destination import permit or documented no-permit analysis before delivery.
Require approved delivery-site, chain-of-custody, and restricted-party screening evidence.
Require remote support runbook covering named personnel, MFA, logging, approval windows, and firmware controls.
Require signed DPA covering processing scope, subprocessors, retention, deletion, and transfers.
Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.
Require cross-border transfer mechanism and hosting/support region confirmation.
Require current subprocessor register and change-notification terms.
Require BCP/DR and exit assistance evidence for critical workflows.

agent_trace.input_summary: Unresolved high-risk gaps or insufficient proof remained after council review.
agent_trace.output_summary: Escalated to accountable human reviewer; no autonomous approval permitted.

agent_trace.input_summary: Node deterministic result, specialist critiques, precedent, and advisory-only Compass output.
agent_trace.output_summary: Final decision sealed as needs_more_information by deterministic policy owner.

agent_trace.input_summary: Decision, evidence, missing proof, council trace, and human review boundary.
agent_trace.output_summary: Packaged judge-readable audit trace with evidence, specialist challenges, and final owner.

agent_trace.input_summary: Final packaged decision and trace summary.
agent_trace.output_summary: Deterministic review needs more information before a compliance decision can progress. Risk is critical; 12 evidence gap(s) remain. Compass advisory status: skipped_sample_mode. Learning memory found 5 advisory similar case(s).

agents.name: Intake Agent
agents.role: Extracts case facts, missing facts, and delegates evidence needs.

agents.name: Evidence Retrieval Agent
agents.role: Searches supplied and local evidence signals, retries weak coverage, and reports sufficiency.

agents.name: Privacy Specialist
agents.role: Reviews DPA, subprocessors, retention, transfer, data categories, and model-training exclusions.

agents.name: Security Specialist
agents.role: Reviews SOC 2, ISO, access control, encryption, logging, BCP, and technical assurance evidence.

agents.name: Responsible AI Specialist
agents.role: Challenges AI use, model training, automation, oversight, and transparency risk.

agents.name: Learning & Precedent Specialist
agents.role: Looks up deterministic synthetic precedent patterns as advisory memory.

agents.name: Compass Advisory Critic
agents.role: Runs live Compass advisory review when configured; never owns the final decision.

agents.name: Final Advisory Reviewer
agents.role: Optional live CrewAI advisory reviewer when AGENT_RUNTIME=crewai_live; advisory only.

agents.name: Deterministic Decision Owner
agents.role: Applies deterministic policy and remains final decision authority.

agents.name: Audit Packager
agents.role: Packages the decision, evidence, collaboration trace, and review artifacts.

fixtureDocumentsUsed.title: AI Accelerator Chip Import And Export Control Agreement

required_actions: Assign the accountable business unit or requester before approval.
Confirm the operating geography and regulatory perimeter.
Ask the domain owner whether esg, hse and bcm obligations apply.
Require final export-control classification with manufacturer/counsel evidence before shipment.
Require documented license analysis and hold points for export, re-export, and import approvals.
Require final end-use and end-user certificate before hardware release or firmware support.
Require destination import permit or documented no-permit analysis before delivery.
Require approved delivery-site, chain-of-custody, and restricted-party screening evidence.
Require remote support runbook covering named personnel, MFA, logging, approval windows, and firmware controls.
Require signed DPA covering processing scope, subprocessors, retention, deletion, and transfers.
Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.
Require cross-border transfer mechanism and hosting/support region confirmation.
Require current subprocessor register and change-notification terms.
Require BCP/DR and exit assistance evidence for critical workflows.
reviewer_questions: Has any analytics data been used for model improvement or service training?
Are any support teams accessing records outside approved regions?
result.summary: Deterministic review needs more information before a compliance decision can progress. Risk is critical; 12 evidence gap(s) remain. Compass advisory status: skipped_sample_mode. Learning memory found 5 advisory similar case(s).
